title: Chooba
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Chooba''' were small, herd-dwelling [[Snail/Legends|slugs]] from [[Kirdo III/Legends|Kirdo III]]. They were often hunted and eaten by [[Kitonak/Legends|Kitonak]]. The Kitonak would mimic the creature's favorite dish, the [[sulfaro plant]]. They would lie down and wait for a chooba to climb up to its head looking for the real plant's meaty interior. The Kitonak would then swallow the slug whole. One chooba could last a Kitonak a full month.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1stm}}
